title: Youtube Poop: Possessive Pronoun Noun Pronoun
description:
This is an entry for the My Life Me Collab.  I'd have made it longer except that the limit for each video was one minute.  But lemme know if you like this source and want me to make more poops of it.

And check out the collab too: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_KfGhugUi6w
